---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new functionality or technical improvement.
title: "[FEATURE]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## 💡 Concept
Describe the proposed feature.

## 🔍 The Problem
What inefficiency or lack of protection does this feature address?

## ⚙️ Operational Logic
How would this feature fit into the existing architecture? Briefly describe the data flow.

## 🏗 Alignment with Pillars
How does this feature align with our core pillars?
- [ ] Safety & Protection (Social Impact)
- [ ] Robust Engineering
- [ ] Digital Sovereignty (Privacy/Cryptography)

## 🛡️ Security Check
What are the potential risks of implementing this feature?
